entries.title: Fiserv and OpenAI Bring Frontier AI to Banks
entries.summary: Fiserv has announced an agentic artificial intelligence (AI) operating system designed for banking and a collaboration with OpenAI to put frontier AI to work for financial institutions. entries.title: Martha Stewart Wants AI to Run Your Home
entries.summary: Martha Stewart has spent decades telling Americans how to take care of their homes. Now she wants artificial intelligence to do it for them. Hint is an AI-powered home management platform that monitors properties for maintenance needs, expiring insurance policies, high utility bills and repair risks before they become emergencies. entries.title: Microsoft Eyes AI Acquisitions Ahead of OpenAI Split
entries.summary: Microsoft is reportedly looking to acquire startups to help it launch a new artificial intelligence model, Reuters reported Wednesday (May 13). The report characterized the move as preparation by the tech giant for a future separate from OpenAI. Microsoft had considered acquiring code-generation startup Cursor but rejected the idea due to in-house concerns that […] The post Microsoft Eyes AI

entries.title: Amazon Bets on Voice as Agentic Commerce’s Winning AI Interface
entries.summary: For years, retail’s artificial intelligence (AI) ambitions revolved around making search smarter. entries.title: Digital Prime Technologies launches digital asset lending platform
entries.summary: Digital Prime Technologies, a provider of digital asset technology solutions, today announced the launch of Tokenet, its institutional digital asset lending platform, with the first trades now successfully executed on the platform.

entries.title: Lamina expands nCino integration
entries.summary: Lamina and Farm Credit Bank of Texas (FCBT) today announced a strategic partnership to modernize FCBT’s capital markets operations through the implementation of Lamina, a purpose-built platform for managing loan syndications and participations through API-driven workflow orchestration and AI-powered data extraction.

entries.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani calls on regulator to block Western Union takeover of rival
entries.summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has asked regulators to block Western Union's proposed acquisition of Intermex, arguing that the money transfer giant wants to buy its rival to "jack up remittance fees".
